testCase.name: Mathpix NEET parser (Flip test-25) splits questions and solutions sections
Mathpix NEET parser (Flip test-25) extracts 20 numbered questions
Mathpix NEET parser (Flip test-25) extracts 20 numbered solutions
Mathpix NEET parser (Flip test-25) keeps multi-line question content together
Mathpix NEET parser (Flip test-25) keeps multi-line solution content together
Mathpix NEET parser (Flip test-25) matches every question to its solution without warnings
